description: Master100 — 100 human-style IT tickets for Nextera Technologies (global technology firm). Gold labels per ticket. Primary Nasscom jury validation suite.

cases.title: Forgot password — cannot sign in to employee portal
cases.description: I forgot my Nextera employee portal password and my account is locked after too many attempts. I need to reset it before my 9 AM standup.

cases.title: Authenticator app lost — need MFA reset for VPN
cases.description: I replaced my phone and lost the Microsoft Authenticator app. I cannot complete MFA when connecting to corporate VPN.

cases.title: New hire cannot log in — AD account not provisioned
cases.description: New hire starting today cannot log in to laptop or email. HR says onboarding is complete but Active Directory account shows not found.

cases.title: Okta SSO redirect loop on benefits portal
cases.description: After changing my password yesterday, Okta keeps redirecting in a loop when I open the employee benefits portal. Browser cache cleared, still failing.

cases.title: Employee badge denied at office entry gate
cases.description: My employee badge shows access denied at the Bangalore office entry gate. HR portal shows badge active but the reader keeps flashing red.

cases.title: Returned from parental leave — need VPN access re-enabled
cases.description: I returned from parental leave today. I cannot connect to corporate VPN — the client says my remote access account is disabled.

cases.title: Password expired — self-service reset page errors out
cases.description: Windows says my password expired. The self-service reset page loads but throws an error after I submit the form.

cases.title: SAP production user locked — need account unlock
cases.description: SAP GUI shows my production user ID is locked after too many login attempts. I need unlock for month-end journal entries due today.

cases.title: Contractor access expired — need 30-day extension
cases.description: My contractor badge and VPN access expired yesterday but the integration project continues two more weeks. Need access extension approved.

cases.title: Privileged access request — Jenkins admin role
cases.description: I need temporary Jenkins admin role for production hotfix deployment tonight. Manager approved via email.

cases.title: Outlook not syncing new emails since morning
cases.description: Outlook desktop stopped receiving new emails around 8 AM. Webmail works fine. Send/receive shows no errors.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams crashes immediately on launch
cases.description: Teams closes right after splash screen on Windows 11. Error code 0xc0000142. I have customer calls all afternoon.

cases.title: Zoom app microphone not working in meetings
cases.description: In Zoom desktop app my microphone shows unmuted but colleagues cannot hear me. Headset works in Spotify and Teams. Zoom version 6.0.4.

cases.title: SharePoint finance library permission denied on upload
cases.description: Cannot upload Q2 forecast spreadsheet to SharePoint finance document library. Error: permission denied. Same folder worked last week.

cases.title: Jira login page blank after Chrome update
cases.description: Jira Cloud shows a blank white page after yesterday's Chrome update. Tried incognito, same issue.

cases.title: Confluence pages timing out for entire team
cases.description: Our squad Confluence space times out on every page load since 11 AM. Other teams report normal access.

cases.title: Slack desktop notifications stopped appearing
cases.description: Slack is open but I no longer get desktop notifications for mentions. Mobile app still alerts normally.

cases.title: Webex cloud recording missing from last town hall
cases.description: Webex recording for yesterday's all-hands is not in the portal. Organizer says recording was enabled.

cases.title: Google Calendar not showing shared conference rooms
cases.description: Shared conference room calendars disappeared from Google Calendar sidebar. Cannot book rooms for client workshops.

cases.title: OneDrive sync stuck at 99 percent for engineering folder
cases.description: OneDrive sync icon stuck at 99 percent on the engineering shared folder. Colleagues see my files as outdated. OneDrive for Business client 24.002.

cases.title: Salesforce opportunity page throws unknown error
cases.description: Opening any opportunity record in Salesforce shows 'An unexpected error occurred'. Reports and list views work.

cases.title: Workday timecard submit button spins forever
cases.description: Workday time entry page spins when I click Submit. Payroll cutoff is tonight for US employees.

cases.title: ServiceNow catalog laptop request greyed out
cases.description: Laptop refresh item in ServiceNow service catalog is greyed out for my location. Policy says I am eligible.

cases.title: SAP Fiori finance tile missing after role change
cases.description: After internal transfer my SAP Fiori finance approval tile is missing. HR confirmed role update in SAP.

cases.title: Internal HR portal returns 500 error on login
cases.description: Nextera HR self-service portal returns HTTP 500 immediately after login. Issue started after weekend maintenance.

cases.title: Expense report stuck in manager pending for two weeks
cases.description: Concur expense report has been in manager pending for 14 days. Manager says they never received notification.

cases.title: CRM customer export produces empty CSV file
cases.description: Exporting active customer list from internal CRM downloads a 0-byte CSV. Filter shows 12,000 records on screen.

cases.title: Revenue billing dashboard spinner for EMEA region only
cases.description: Revenue billing dashboard in internal BI app shows spinner indefinitely for EMEA users. US team can access the same dashboard normally.

cases.title: License portal shows wrong seat count for Figma
cases.description: Figma license portal shows 45 seats used but we only have 30 designers. Cannot assign new licenses.

cases.title: Release portal pipeline queue frozen since midnight
cases.description: Internal release portal shows all production pipelines queued since 12:05 AM. No deployments have started.

cases.title: PostgreSQL read replica lag exceeding 20 minutes
cases.description: Monitoring alert: PostgreSQL read replica lag on orders DB exceeds 20 minutes. Checkout service reading stale inventory.

cases.title: MySQL connection pool exhausted on reporting API
cases.description: Reporting API logs show MySQL connection pool exhausted. Dashboard requests timing out for all users.

cases.title: SQL Server deadlock blocking payroll batch job
cases.description: Payroll batch job failed with SQL Server deadlock on HRPROD. Rerun attempted twice, same failure.

cases.title: Oracle listener not responding on finance DB host
cases.description: Cannot connect to Oracle finance database. TNS listener on port 1521 not responding since 6 AM.

cases.title: MongoDB Atlas queries timing out on catalog service
cases.description: Product catalog API queries against MongoDB Atlas M40 timing out. p95 latency jumped from 40ms to 8 seconds.

cases.title: Redis cluster failover did not complete
cases.description: Redis cluster primary failed over but new primary not accepting writes. Session cache errors across web tier.

cases.title: Snowflake warehouse suspended — overnight ETL blocked
cases.description: Snowflake virtual warehouse auto-suspended and overnight ETL jobs did not restart. Marketing attribution data stale.

cases.title: Elasticsearch cluster index status red
cases.description: Elasticsearch production cluster shows red index status on customer-events index. Kibana searches failing.

cases.title: DynamoDB throttling on production user-preferences table
cases.description: DynamoDB ProvisionedThroughputExceededException on user-preferences table during peak login window.

cases.title: Nightly database backup job failed with checksum error
cases.description: Last night's full backup of customer DB failed with checksum mismatch. Backup team needs investigation before tonight's run.

cases.title: VPN error 619 when connecting from hotel Wi-Fi
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN fails with error 619 from hotel Wi-Fi. Need access for executive review deck due tonight.

cases.title: Internal app DNS name not resolving on corporate network
cases.description: Hostname inventory.nextera.internal does not resolve on wired network. Was working Friday. nslookup returns NXDOMAIN.

cases.title: Corporate proxy blocking npm package downloads
cases.description: npm install fails behind corporate proxy with 403 forbidden for registry.npmjs.org. Blocks frontend build pipeline locally.

cases.title: Firewall change blocked SFTP to vendor file drop
cases.description: After firewall rule push last night SFTP to vendor file drop (sftp.partner.com) times out. Finance cannot send daily settlement files.

cases.title: Office Wi-Fi 802.1X certificate expired — Building B
cases.description: Building B office Wi-Fi rejects connections with certificate expired error. Hundreds of engineers on guest network only.

cases.title: MPLS link down between Hyderabad and Singapore offices
cases.description: MPLS circuit between Hyderabad and Singapore shows down since 4 AM. Cross-region file shares unreachable.

cases.title: WAN latency spike to primary data center
cases.description: Network monitoring shows sustained 400ms latency on WAN link to primary data center. Internal apps sluggish for US East users.

cases.title: Load balancer health checks failing for API gateway
cases.description: F5 load balancer marks all API gateway pool members down. External health endpoint returns 502.

cases.title: IP address conflict on engineering VLAN
cases.description: Engineering VLAN reports duplicate IP conflict for 10.42.18.44. Several developers lose network intermittently.

cases.title: BGP session flapping on internet edge router
cases.description: BGP session to ISP flapping on edge router ASR-01. Brief internet outages every few minutes for HQ users.

cases.title: Printer paper jam on 5th floor — payroll forms
cases.description: HP LaserJet on 5th floor shows paper jam. Cannot print signed payroll adjustment forms needed by noon.

cases.title: Laptop blue screen after Windows update
cases.description: Company laptop BSOD with stop code PAGE_FAULT_IN_NONPAGED_AREA after Tuesday Windows update. Cannot boot to desktop.

cases.title: Conference room projector shows no signal
cases.description: Projector in Conference Room 12A shows no signal from HDMI laptop input. Tried two cables and two laptops.

cases.title: VMware host CPU alarm at 98 percent sustained
cases.description: vCenter alarm: ESXi host esx-prod-07 CPU at 98 percent for 45 minutes. VMs on host running slow.

cases.title: Windows file server disk 98 percent full on engineering share
cases.description: \\fileserver\engineering share reports disk 98 percent full. Team cannot save build artifacts or logs.

cases.title: MacBook FileVault recovery key needed after reboot
cases.description: MacBook prompted for FileVault recovery key after unexpected reboot. User does not have escrowed key handy.

cases.title: Docking station not detecting second monitor
cases.description: Dell docking station does not detect second monitor after laptop sleep. Unplug-replug works briefly then fails.

cases.title: KVM switch not switching between lab servers
cases.description: KVM in lab rack stuck on server 2 input. Keyboard and monitor do not switch to server 1 for maintenance.

cases.title: UPS battery replacement alert in server room 3B
cases.description: APC UPS in server room 3B reports battery replace required. Runtime estimate below 5 minutes on outage.

cases.title: Datacenter rack thermal alert — inlet temperature high
cases.description: DCIM alert: rack A14 inlet temperature 32°C exceeding threshold. Affected hosts may throttle.

cases.title: Finance NAS share offline — cannot open spreadsheets
cases.description: \\nas-finance\shared is offline since 7 AM. Finance team cannot open month-end models.

cases.title: SAN LUN mapping wrong after storage migration
cases.description: After weekend SAN migration database server sees incorrect LUN size. SQL Server will not start.

cases.title: Backup tape library door open alert
cases.description: Backup system reports tape library door open sensor triggered. Nightly mainframe backup did not start.

cases.title: S3 lifecycle policy deleted wrong prefix by mistake
cases.description: Ops engineer accidentally deleted S3 lifecycle policy for analytics/raw prefix. Compliance wants confirmation no data loss.

cases.title: Need file restore from Friday backup — deleted folder
cases.description: User deleted project folder on shared drive yesterday. Need restore from Friday night backup to original path.

cases.title: NetApp snapshot restore request for legal hold
cases.description: Legal team requests restore of NetApp snapshot from March 3 for litigation hold. Snapshot exists per storage admin.

cases.title: Azure blob container access denied after policy change
cases.description: Application cannot read Azure blob container nextera-prod-assets after IAM policy update. 403 on all objects.

cases.title: iSCSI path down on database server DB-PROD-02
cases.description: iSCSI paths to storage array show degraded on DB-PROD-02. Multipath reports single path only.

cases.title: Archive retrieval slower than 24-hour SLA
cases.description: Glacier archive retrieval for audit logs has been in progress 36 hours. SLA is 24 hours.

cases.title: Dropbox Business team folder over quota
cases.description: Marketing Dropbox Business team folder exceeded quota. Designers cannot upload campaign assets.

cases.title: AWS EC2 production API instance unreachable
cases.description: Production API EC2 instance i-0a9f2c passes status checks but SSH and HTTPS timeout since deploy.

cases.title: GKE cluster nodes NotReady after node pool upgrade
cases.description: GKE prod cluster node pool upgrade left 3 nodes in NotReady state. Pods stuck pending.

cases.title: Azure AD app registration certificate expired
cases.description: Internal SSO integration failing because Azure AD app registration cert expired at midnight. Login errors for partner portal.

cases.title: GitHub Actions self-hosted runner offline
cases.description: Self-hosted GitHub Actions runner nextera-build-05 shows offline. Release pipeline blocked for three repos.

cases.title: Docker registry pull rate limited in CI
cases.description: CI pipelines failing with Docker Hub rate limit exceeded when pulling base images. Affects all feature branches.

cases.title: Kubernetes pod CrashLoopBackOff on payment service
cases.description: payment-service pods in prod namespace CrashLoopBackOff after config map update. Customers cannot checkout.

cases.title: Terraform state lock stuck after interrupted apply
cases.description: Terraform apply was interrupted and state lock on S3 backend not released. Team cannot deploy infrastructure changes.

cases.title: Jenkins build agent disconnected from controller
cases.description: Jenkins agent label docker-large disconnected. All Docker builds queued with no available executor.

cases.title: Artifactory 403 forbidden on Maven dependencies
cases.description: Maven builds fail pulling dependencies from Artifactory with 403 forbidden. Started after permission audit.

cases.title: CloudWatch alarms not firing for RDS CPU
cases.description: RDS CPU above 90 percent for 20 minutes but CloudWatch alarm did not fire. On-call was not paged.

cases.title: Security incident: employee clicked phishing link
cases.description: Employee reported clicking link in phishing email pretending to be IT password reset. Browser forwarded to unknown site.

cases.title: Security incident: ransomware alert on finance laptop
cases.description: Microsoft Defender flagged ransomware behavior on finance analyst laptop. Machine isolated automatically.

cases.title: Security incident: API key posted in public Slack channel
cases.description: Engineer accidentally pasted production API key in public Slack channel. Key needs immediate rotation.

cases.title: Security incident: impossible travel login alert
cases.description: Identity alert: same user logged in from Austin and Singapore within 10 minutes. Possible account compromise.

cases.title: Security incident: USB malware insertion detected
cases.description: Endpoint protection alert: suspected malware introduced via USB on lab workstation. Device quarantined.

cases.title: Security incident: DDoS attack on customer portal
cases.description: Security incident: DDoS attack saturating bandwidth to customer portal. WAF triggered but site intermittently down.

cases.title: Security incident: privilege escalation attempt on Linux host
cases.description: SIEM alert: repeated sudo privilege escalation attempts on production Linux host from unknown IP.

cases.title: Security incident: customer database backup exposed publicly
cases.description: Security researcher reported publicly accessible S3 object containing customer database backup export.

cases.title: Security incident: compromised service account in GCP
cases.description: GCP security command center flagged suspicious API calls from service account sa-deploy-prod. Possible key compromise.

cases.title: Security incident: suspicious outbound traffic to unknown IP
cases.description: Firewall alert: app server sending sustained outbound traffic to unknown IP in Eastern Europe. Possible C2 beacon.

cases.title: Production customer API returning HTTP 503 errors
cases.description: Customer-facing API returning 503 Service Unavailable since 10:15 AM. Status page not yet updated.

cases.title: Payment gateway integration timeout at checkout
cases.description: Checkout flow times out calling payment gateway integration. Orders stuck in payment pending state.

cases.title: LDAP sync broken for customer support portal
cases.description: Customer support portal LDAP sync job failed overnight. Agents cannot log in with corporate credentials.

cases.title: TLS certificate expired on customer portal — browser warning
cases.description: Browser shows certificate expired warning on portal.nextera.com. Customers reporting they cannot access their accounts.

cases.title: Central log aggregation pipeline stopped ingesting EU logs
cases.description: Splunk forwarders stopped ingesting logs from EU region since 3 AM. Operations dashboards missing events.

cases.title: CI build failing on internal Git certificate trust error
cases.description: All main-branch CI builds fail cloning internal Git with x509 certificate signed by unknown authority.

cases.title: Mobile app push notifications not delivered
cases.description: iOS and Android users report no push notifications since app release 4.2.1 yesterday evening.

cases.title: GDPR data export tool errors for customer request
cases.description: GDPR data export tool returns error when processing customer deletion request. Legal deadline in 48 hours.

cases.title: Monitoring dashboard green but internal apps degraded
cases.description: Status dashboard shows all green but internal teams report widespread slowness. Possible monitoring blind spot.

cases.title: Datacenter generator monthly test failed
cases.description: Scheduled monthly generator test failed to start at primary datacenter. Facilities ticket raised, need IT impact assessment.
